boundary: An error occurred, if the problem persists, please contact support.

resourceNotFound.title: Page not found
resourceNotFound.subtitle: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
resourceNotFound.paragraph: Check the address or go back to the home page.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.subtitle: You need to be logged in to access this page.
unauthorized.paragraph: Please log in and try again.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.subtitle: You do not have permission to access this page.
forbidden.paragraph: If you think this is a mistake, please contact support.

badRequest.title: Bad request
badRequest.subtitle: The request sent was invalid.
badRequest.paragraph: Check your input and try again.

serverError.title: Server error
serverError.subtitle: Something went wrong on our end.
serverError.paragraph: If the problem persists, please contact support.

unhandledError.title: Unexpected error
unhandledError.subtitle: Something went wrong.
unhandledError.paragraph: If the problem persists, please contact support.
